title: A Lean 4 formalization of a SimpleDNF switching lemma with CNF-dual and explicit layer-schedule infrastructure
description:
A curated Lean 4 artifact for a SimpleDNF switching lemma in a canonical decision-tree encoding, together with a CNF-dual bridge, bounded-depth formula bridge infrastructure, explicit and generated layer-schedule certificates, and (v0.4.0) variable-coverage floors for a local cut-free bounded-depth Tait trace system (for every h > 0; linear in the number of variables), a parameterized 2h falsified-clause search depth floor via a reusable stateful adversary with formalized 3x2 tightness, completeness of the local system with pigeonhole non-vacuity witnesses (completeness alone proves no hardness), and a composed family refutation-to-search-to-adversary route.

Non-claims: this artifact does not prove P != NP, P = NP, an NP or circuit lower bound, a Frege/PHP lower bound, a proof-size lower bound for any proof system with cut, arbitrary AC0 collapse, arbitrary bounded-depth formula collapse, or a general CNF switching lemma independent of the explicit dualization bridge. The coverage/trace floors are structural bounds, linear in the number of PHP variables, on the repository's local cut-free trace system (stated for h > 0); the 2h search floor is a decision-tree bound for the falsified-clause search problem (vacuous for p <= h; non-vacuity witnessed at 3x2) with tightness formalized only at the fixed 3x2 instance.
